CVE-2020-27304.title: The CivetWeb web library does not validate uploaded filepaths whe ...
CVE-2020-27304.description: The CivetWeb web library does not validate uploaded filepaths when running on an OS other than Windows, when using the built-in HTTP form-based file upload mechanism, via the mg_handle_form_request API. Web applications that use the file upload form handler, and use parts of the user-controlled filename in the output path, are susceptible to directory traversal

CVE-2025-55763.title: Buffer Overflow in the URI parser of CivetWeb 1.14 through 1.16 ( ...
CVE-2025-55763.description: Buffer Overflow in the URI parser of CivetWeb 1.14 through 1.16 (latest) allows a remote attacker to achieve remote code execution via a crafted HTTP request. This vulnerability is triggered during request processing and may allow an attacker to corrupt heap memory, potentially leading to denial of service or arbitrary code execution.
